creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194128
patch2

I marked net/ntop broken, because it uses too many makefile hacks that don't work with the new automake.  It's also abandonware.  Upstream works on net/ntopng now.

I also marked textproc/ots broken.  It's unfetchable for me and upstream sf.net project is gone.
